## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Mara Leighton and Bridget McGillivray to discuss Mara's background and potential fit for a role at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mara has a diverse background in journalism, content strategy, and client relationship management](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [fwd.digital is rapidly growing, emphasizing AI-forward thinking and automation in their culture](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [The role involves account management with a focus on content strategy and client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Work culture aims for flexibility while maintaining client coverage and productivity](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

## Topics

### Mara's Professional Background

  - [6.5 years at Business Insider in various roles (reviews, education vertical, breaking news, tech reporting)](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Transitioned to freelance consulting for enterprise and small businesses](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Current role at verbatim as Strategy and Ops Lead, focusing on content strategy and client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Managing 17-19 accounts, aiming for an ideal of 5-10 accounts for deeper engagement](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)

### Account Management Approach

  - [Emphasizes transparency, proactive communication, and clear expectations](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Adapts communication style to match client personalities](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Currently piloting new processes to improve efficiency (e.g., templating content, hiring specialized editors)](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Experimenting with alternative meeting formats (e.g., Loom recordings) to reduce client overwhelm](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

### fwd.digital Company Culture

  - [AI-forward thinking is central to the company's thesis and culture](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Focus on automation and building leverage to avoid slow, clunky processes](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Seeking resourceful individuals who can thrive in a fast-scaling startup environment](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Emphasis on solving recurring issues with automated solutions](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)

### Work Schedule and Expectations

  - [Aiming for overlap with PST morning hours (8am-12pm Pacific) for team coordination](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Flexible approach to working hours, prioritizing client coverage and productivity over strict schedules](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Unlimited PTO policy, encouraging work-life balance while ensuring work gets done](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to discuss with Marcel (likely the CEO or another decision-maker) about Mara's potential fit](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Follow-up communication to be sent to Mara regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [Mara to consider how her experience aligns with fwd.digital's AI-forward and automation-focused culture](https://fathom.video/share/3cLTE2UxrBN4YsbNQzyxzoLYqpB9aRCu?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
